pages.title: Sleeping Animals
pages.text: Animals now lay down and sleep at night. This is mainly cosmetic, however, animals do heal slowly while sleeping, allowing for a nice way to heal.

pages.title: Sleeping Horses
pages.text: Horses sleep in a special fashion. When O-Horses sleep, one horse (the leader) will almost always remain standing, and the others in the herd will lay down. Don't worry, the leader will still get resting benefits (healing).
